nasb.text: Then the Lord came down in a pillar of cloud and stood at the doorway of the tent, and He called Aaron and Miriam. When they had both come forward,

esv.text: And the Lord came down in a pillar of cloud and stood at the entrance of the tent and called Aaron and Miriam, and they both came forward.

cnv.text: 耶和華在雲柱中降臨，停在會幕門口，呼召亞倫和米利暗；他們二人就前去。

ccb.text: 耶和华在云柱中降临，站在会幕门口呼唤亚伦和米利暗，二人就走到前面。
